title: Can you batch action the creation on Subitems in multiple items?

posts.author: Kokobun (Koray Gates)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there a way to create the same subitems for multiple items? I have many items that need to have the same subitems but I cannot find a way to either copy the subitems to other items or to batch create them.

Thanks.

posts.author: simon_blinno (Simon Blickenstorfer)
posts.cookedHtml: Create an item with the needed subitems and move it to a group in the top called “template” wenn you need a new item just duplicate the item in the template. It’s not the perfect solution but it works as workaround

posts.author: KimFarber (Kim Farber)
posts.cookedHtml:
In addition to the excellent workaround above (Create an item with the needed subitems and move it to a group in the top called “template” when you need a new item just duplicate the item in the template.) another option is to duplicate all subitems and then move to the new item that has been created.
Simply hover over the left of the subitem and select it. Once the subitem(s) are selected, press on ‘Duplicate’ and then ‘Move to’ in the menu that appears at the bottom of the screen and select the item that you’d like to move it to.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
